title: Build Your Etsy Size Set Once — Apply It to Every New Design in One Click
description: Stop rebuilding your size set every time. SnapToSize My Packs lets Etsy sellers save their winning size lineup — 2:3, 4:5, ISO A-series, Extras — and reuse it on every new design in one click. 70 print-ready files per upload. 300 DPI. Smart ZIP under Etsy's 20MB cap. Free: 1 saved pack. Pro: unlimited packs.
